name: HARMONIC INC.
summary: Harmonic Inc. is a leading global provider of broadband access solutions enabling broadband operators to deploy high-speed internet for data, voice, and video services. Its Broadband business offers the cOS software-based broadband access solution running on commercial-off-the-shelf servers, supporting DOCSIS and PON services via distributed access architecture. The company derives approximately 89% of revenue from the Americas and is divesting its Video business to Leone Media Inc. for $145 million.

products.name: cOS
products.description: Software-based broadband access solution running on COTS servers, supporting DOCSIS and PON/FTTH services via distributed access nodes.

products.name: Indoor OLT Shelves
products.description: Indoor optical line termination shelves delivering PON services as part of the cOS solution.

products.name: Hardened Outdoor OLT Shelves
products.description: Outdoor optical line termination shelves for delivering PON services in field deployments.

products.name: OLT Modules
products.description: Optical line termination modules that plug into DAA nodes to support FTTH PON services.

products.name: Distributed Access Architecture (DAA) Nodes
products.description: Field-deployed nodes that distribute RF and optical processing outside the headend to reduce space and power requirements.
